proof:
by
  intro j hj k
  have h1 : (L.map length).partialSums[j+1] > i := by
    have := findIdx_get (L.map length).partialSums (· > i)
    simp at this
    by_cases w : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length L).partialSums = 0
    · simp [w] at j; omega
    · have := this ⟨_, w⟩
      simp [j] at this ⊢
      omega
  have h2 : (L.map length).partialSums[j] ≤ i := by
    by_cases w : j = 0
    · simp [w]
    · have := findIdx_get_not (L.map length).partialSums (· > i) (j) (by omega)
      simp at this ⊢
      omega
  simp [getElem_partialSums] at h1 h2
  rw [length_flatten, sum_take] at h1 h2
  simp [length_flatten, sum_take, k]
  omega
